Onboard a new Diggspace client: 'meridian ============================================================================= MERIDIAN CAPITAL PARTNERS — DIGGSPACE ONBOARDING BRIEF Internal Use Only · Digital Workspace Implementation ============================================================================= CLIENT OVERVIEW ─────────────── Company: Meridian Capital Partners Industry: Investment Management & Private Equity Headquarters: Lisbon, Portugal (offices also in London and Frankfurt) Employees: ~320 (120 in Lisbon, 110 in London, 90 in Frankfurt) Languages: Portuguese (primary), English (secondary), German (tertiary) Brand identity: Primary color: #1B2E4B (deep navy — main UI chrome, headers) Primary contrast: #FFFFFF (white text on navy) Secondary color: #C9A84C (gold — accents, highlights, badges) Warn color: #D94F3D (deep red — alerts, warnings) Warn contrast: #FFFFFF Website: https://meridiancapital.pt Company logo: Already uploaded to CMS at: cms/media/images/meridian/meridian-logo-white.png SCOPE CONFIGURATION ─────────────────── Scope name: Meridian Capital Partners Welcome message: "Welcome to the Meridian Capital Partners digital workspace. Stay informed, aligned, and connected — wherever you are." Channel creation: Admins only (strict governance required) Number of highlights: 4 Highlights carousel: true Highlights style: BannerCarousel Footer — three columns: Column 1 "Company" - About Meridian → https://meridiancapital.pt/about - Careers → https://meridiancapital.pt/careers - Investor Relations → https://meridiancapital.pt/investors Column 2 "Offices" - Lisbon HQ → https://meridiancapital.pt/contact/lisbon - London → https://meridiancapital.pt/contact/london - Frankfurt → https://meridiancapital.pt/contact/frankfurt Column 3 "Resources" - IT Helpdesk → https://help.meridiancapital.pt - HR Portal → https://hr.meridiancapital.pt - Compliance Vault → https://compliance.meridiancapital.pt Social links: LinkedIn → https://linkedin.com/company/meridian-capital-partners CHANNEL LINEUP (in order of priority — pin top 2 as sticky) ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── 1. NEWSROOM [sticky, corporate, color #1B2E4B] Description: "

Official announcements, market commentary, and leadership updates from Meridian Capital Partners. This is the primary broadcast channel for firm-wide communications.

" Tabs: Articles only Initial tab: Articles Hide from homepage feed: false Require read confirmation on important articles: yes (set per-article) 2. INVESTMENT INSIGHTS [sticky, public, color #C9A84C] Description: "

Research notes, sector analyses, portfolio updates, and macroeconomic commentary from our investment teams in Lisbon, London, and Frankfurt.

" Tabs: Articles, Pages Initial tab: Articles 3. COMPLIANCE & RISK [corporate, color #D94F3D] Description: "

Regulatory updates, compliance policies, risk frameworks, and mandatory reads. All staff are required to acknowledge policy updates in this channel.

" Tabs: Articles, Pages Initial tab: Articles Default role: Reader (everyone can read, only editors publish) 4. PEOPLE & CULTURE [public, color #2E6B4F] Description: "

HR announcements, benefits information, onboarding resources, team spotlights, and culture initiatives across all three offices.

" Tabs: Articles, Pages Initial tab: Articles 5. OPERATIONS [private, color #4A4A6A] Description: "

Internal operational updates, office management notices, IT maintenance windows, and facilities information.

" Tabs: Articles, Pages Initial tab: Articles 6. EVENTS & MILESTONES [public, color #C9A84C] Description: "

Firm events, client dinners, milestone celebrations, team off-sites, and CSR initiatives. Keep track of what's happening across the firm.

" Tabs: Articles Initial tab: Articles WELCOME ARTICLE (to publish in Newsroom after scope is built) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Title: "Welcome to the Meridian Capital Partners Digital Workspace" Status: Published Sticky: true Main highlight: true Notify: true Body:

Your new digital home

We're delighted to launch the Meridian Capital Partners digital workspace — a central hub for everything that matters across our Lisbon, London, and Frankfurt offices.

What you'll find here

  • Newsroom — firm-wide announcements and leadership communications
  • Investment Insights — research, analysis, and portfolio updates
  • Compliance & Risk — policies and mandatory reads
  • People & Culture — HR, benefits, and team news
  • Operations — IT, facilities, and office management
  • Events & Milestones — what's on across the firm

Questions or feedback? Reach your workspace administrator at workspace@meridiancapital.pt.

GLOBAL SETTINGS (apply after scope is built) ──────────────────────────────────────────── Company name: Meridian Capital Partners Website name: Meridian Workspace Default language: pt-PT Supported languages: pt-PT, en-US, de-DE Sidebar navigation (in order): apps, collaborators, documents, approvalRequests, learning ============================================================================= END OF BRIEF ============================================================================='. No brief provided. Use sensible professional defaults appropriate for the client name. PHASE 1 — CONNECTIVITY & SCOPE a. Call check_connection. If it fails, stop and report the error. b. Call create_scope with ALL of the following from the brief (none should be null or default): - name, welcome_message, channel_creation_by_admins_only - primary_color, primary_color_contrast, secondary_color, warn_color, warn_color_contrast - number_of_highlights, highlights_carousel, highlights_style - footer_block_links (all columns with all links) - navigation_links (social links) c. Report: scope name, id, route. STOP and wait for confirmation before Phase 2. PHASE 2 — CHANNELS (after Phase 1 is confirmed) Create every channel listed in the brief, in order. For each channel use: - name, description (full HTML from brief), channel_type, color - is_sticky (true for the first 1-2 as specified), tabs, initial_tab - default_role if specified Never use a null description or a generic placeholder. Every channel must feel built. Create channels one at a time. After ALL channels are created, report a table: Channel name | id | type | sticky STOP and wait for confirmation before Phase 3. PHASE 3 — WELCOME ARTICLE (after Phase 2 is confirmed) If the brief includes a welcome article, create it now with create_article: - Use the exact title, body HTML, status, is_sticky, is_main_highlight, notify values from the brief. - Channel: the first/primary channel (Newsroom or equivalent). If no article is in the brief, ask the user whether to create one. PHASE 4 — FINAL SUMMARY Report a clean summary: Scope: [name] — id: [id] — route: [route] Channels: [list with id per channel] Article: [title] — id: [id] (if created) Ask: Is there anything you'd like to adjust or add? RULES - Present a confirmation block before EACH phase. Wait for approval. - Never skip a brief field or substitute a null where the brief provides a value. - Never fabricate colors, URLs, or IDs. - If a phase fails partway through, stop, report exactly what succeeded and what failed, and ask how to proceed.
